items.title: DIA Attracts $167M in Assets as Dow Jumps 741 Points
items.description: - DIA gained inflows Tuesday as an EU tariff delay boosted markets. - SPY saw massive outflows despite the broad market rally.

items.title: Japan's Day Of Economic Reckoning
items.description: Trump has imposed a 25 percent import tariff on Japanese automobiles and a 10 percent base-line tariff on all other imports from Japan.

items.title: Moody's Downgrade Of The U.S. To Aa1 And The Ripple Effect On Bond Ratings
items.description: The Moodyâs downgrade of the US rating to Aa1 from Aaa had a ripple effect through the bond markets, in the form of downgraded credits.

items.title: Federal Reserve Minutes Flag Tariff-Driven Inflation, Eye US Market Volatility As Economic Risk
items.description: FOMC minutes highlight rising inflation risks from tariffs and warn that volatility in U.S. assets could have lasting effects.

items.title: Stocks At Risk As High Valuations Meet Slowing Earnings Growth
items.description: S&P 500 valuations are rising as earnings estimates fall for 2025-2026. Click for my look at the data suggesting this may not just be a temporary phenomenon.
